sql.if: and ( name like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%') or leader like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%') or description like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%') )
and ( name like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%') or leader like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%') or description like concat('%', #{searchInfo}, '%') )

mapper.select:
select * from `group` where is_accepted = 1
order by hot desc, id desc
select * from `group` where is_accepted = 1 order by hot desc, id desc limit 5
mapper.insert: insert into `group` ( name, leader, image, description, attachment, hot, create_user, create_time, modify_user, modify_time, is_accepted ) values ( #{name}, #{leader}, #{image}, #{description}, #{attachment}, #{hot}, #{createUser}, #{createTime}, #{modifyUser}, #{modifyTime}, #{isAccepted} )
mapper.update: update `group` set hot = coalesce(hot, 0) + 1, modify_time = now() where name = #{groupName}
update `group` set description = #{description}, attachment = #{attachment}, image = #{image}, modify_time = now() where name = #{groupName}
update `group` set attachment = #{attachment}, modify_time = now() where name = #{name}
update `group` set image = #{image}, modify_time = now() where name = #{name}
mapper.select:
select * from `group` where 1 = 1
order by id desc
mapper.update: update `group` set is_accepted = 1, modify_time = now() where id = #{groupId}
update `group` set is_accepted = 0, modify_time = now() where id = #{groupId}
